meaning: adj.难懂的,难捉摸的,易忘的
examples: Smell, however, is a highly elusive phenomenon.
Try to catch the elusive charm of the original in translation.
Both of us are biologists, so we swerved to talk about the elusive chameleon.
Bonus: a chance to spot the elusive and endangered blue sheep, unique to this mountain range.
Unfortunately, 20 years down the line, exactly how this may be done remains elusive.
